title: Login Authentication Error
description: User unable to log in via OAuth. Receives 'Invalid Redirect URI' error.

title: Monthly Invoice Not Received
description: Billing cycle ended on the 5th, but the PDF invoice is missing from the portal.

title: Slow Dashboard Loading
description: Main analytics dashboard taking upwards of 12 seconds to render globally.

title: API Rate Limit Clarification
description: Customer needs to know if the 5000 req/min limit is per IP or per API Key.

title: Bug: Profile Picture Not Saving
description: Users report that uploading a .png larger than 2MB results in a silent failure.

title: Refund Request - Subscription
description: Accidental renewal of the Annual Pro plan. Requesting a full refund.

title: CSV Export Formatting Issue
description: Date columns in CSV exports are not following the YYYY-MM-DD format.

title: Account Merging Request
description: User wants to merge their personal account with their new corporate account.

title: Security Vulnerability Report
description: Researcher found a potential XSS vulnerability on the comment submission form.

title: Mobile App Crash on iOS 17
description: App crashes immediately upon opening the 'Settings' menu on iPhone 15.

title: Documentation Typo
description: The endpoint for /v1/users is misspelled as /v1/usrs in the getting started guide.

title: Bulk User Upload Failure
description: Uploading a file with more than 500 users results in a 504 Gateway Timeout.

title: 2FA SMS Not Arriving
description: Customer in the UK is not receiving the 6-digit verification code via SMS.

title: Feature Request: Slack Integration
description: Client wants to receive notification alerts directly in their Slack channels.

title: Payment Method Declined
description: Customer's credit card was declined despite having sufficient funds. Needs manual review.
